title: Political Run: World Leaders
description:
Political Run: World Leaders

Political Run World Leaders is a 3D endless runner where recognizable world leaders sprint through chaotic city streets, slam into cars ahead of them and unleash explosive turbo boosts with powerful screams.

Choose a leader inspired by well-known political figures and dash forward in smooth third-person view. Avoid obstacles, jump over barriers, make quick lane changes and decide which vehicles you’re brave enough to hit. Cars with a health bar can be destroyed for bonus score, but every impact reduces your own health. Large trucks and heavy buses are instant game-enders, turning your heroic run into a spectacular crash.

Collect health packs to stay alive, grab NOS to recharge your scream-boost and activate consumable abilities purchased in the shop. Clear the traffic ahead, enter ghost mode for 10 seconds, slow down time for precise movement or double your score gain for a short burst. The farther you run, the more coins you earn – and the crazier your upgrades become.

You begin with a familiar businessman-style president, but a full roster of nine unlockable leaders awaits you – including shirtless strongmen, classic top-hat presidents and round-faced chairmen reminiscent of Trump, Putin, Obama, Kim and other iconic figures. Each leader features unique animations and upgradable stats for speed, boost power and health, letting you craft your ideal political runner.

Race through three dynamic city environments – sunny City Day, City Night and slippery City Rain – all backed by high-energy music to keep you pushing forward.

Features

World leader characters: Run with characters inspired by Trump, Putin, Obama, Kim and others, each featuring expressive animations and distinct personality.

3D endless runner gameplay: Third-person camera, responsive lane-switching, fast dodging, sliding and jumping through dense traffic.

Destructible and deadly vehicles: Break cars with health bars to earn score, while large unmarked trucks end your run instantly.

Turbo scream boost: Use NOS to unleash a shout-powered acceleration that sends cars flying in exaggerated cartoon-style explosions.

Useful power-ups: Collect health and NOS on the road, and activate shop items such as full NOS refill, full heal, traffic wipe, ghost mode, 2x score and slow-motion.

Progression system: Earn coins from distance and destroyed cars, unlock new leaders and upgrade stats such as speed, boost and health.

Multiple game modes: Enjoy Normal Run, survival-focused Health Mode and a high-pressure Time Trial challenge.

Perfect for players who enjoy endless runners, ragdoll physics, comedy games, arcade action, parody or political satire.
